case_studies.title: Streamlining Assembly Line Scheduling for a Mid-Sized Tools Manufacturer
case_studies.summary: Reduced production delays by redesigning scheduling and material-handling workflows.
case_studies.outcomes: On-time delivery improved from 78% to 96% and overtime hours dropped by 22% within six months.

case_studies.title: Implementing Lean Operations at a Precision Parts Manufacturer
case_studies.summary: Introduced lean practices to reduce waste and stabilize throughput.
case_studies.outcomes: Overall equipment effectiveness increased by 18% and scrap rates fell by 30%.

case_studies.title: Optimizing Make-to-Order Processes for an Industrial Pump Manufacturer
case_studies.summary: Redesigned order intake and production planning for complex custom orders.
case_studies.outcomes: Lead times shortened by 28% and on-time-in-full performance improved to 97%.

case_studies.title: Global Plant Network Optimization for a Heavy Equipment Manufacturer
case_studies.summary: Rationalized a multi-plant network to reduce logistics costs and inventory.
case_studies.outcomes: Network redesign generated annual savings of $14M while improving service levels by 5 points.

case_studies.title: Digitizing SME Lending for a Regional Bank
case_studies.summary: Reimagined SME loan origination, underwriting, and servicing with a digital-first approach.
case_studies.outcomes: Average time-to-decision dropped from 14 days to 48 hours; NPS improved by 16 points.

case_studies.title: Scaling Wealth Operations Without Sacrificing Client Experience
case_studies.summary: Standardized planning workflows and introduced tiered service models for a fast-growing RIA.
case_studies.outcomes: Advisor capacity increased by 30% and client satisfaction rose to 4.7/5.

case_studies.title: Modernizing Patient Onboarding for a Multi-Clinic Healthcare Group
case_studies.summary: Led a six-month digital transformation to redesign patient intake and scheduling.
case_studies.outcomes: New patient onboarding time reduced by 40% and no-show rates decreased by 18%.

case_studies.title: Scaling Telehealth Operations for a Regional Hospital System
case_studies.summary: Redesigned telehealth operating model and capacity planning.
case_studies.outcomes: Telehealth utilization doubled while maintaining 4.8/5 patient satisfaction.

case_studies.title: Building a Go-to-Market Engine for a B2B SaaS Startup
case_studies.summary: Defined ICPs, buyer journeys, and sales plays to accelerate growth.
case_studies.outcomes: Pipeline velocity increased by 35% and ARR grew 60% year-over-year.

case_studies.title: Standardizing Delivery for a Boutique Consulting Firm
case_studies.summary: Created a standardized delivery methodology and playbooks.
case_studies.outcomes: Project margin improved by 8 points and average project cycle time dropped by 15%.

case_studies.title: Launching an Omnichannel Experience for a Specialty Retailer
case_studies.summary: Integrated e-commerce, stores, and fulfillment into a unified customer experience.
case_studies.outcomes: Online conversion increased by 22% and buy-online-pickup-in-store adoption reached 35% of orders.

case_studies.title: Reducing Permit Approval Times for a Regional Government Agency
case_studies.summary: Streamlined permitting workflows and implemented a digital case management system.
case_studies.outcomes: Average permit approval time declined from 90 to 45 days with higher citizen satisfaction scores.

testimonials.quote: The team helped us redesign our SME lending operations end-to-end. We saw faster decisions, happier customers, and a clear roadmap we could execute.
They translated our growth ambitions into practical process changes. Our advisors now spend more time with clients and less time chasing paperwork.
Strong analytical work and solid recommendations, though internal constraints slowed our implementation.
Their team understood our shop floor realities and co-created solutions with our supervisors. The reduction in overtime has been a game changer.
We finally have a handle on our make-to-order lead times. The visibility and discipline they helped us build are now core to how we operate.
They balanced clinical, operational, and technology needs better than any partner we’ve worked with. Our patient onboarding experience is dramatically better.
Their insights into capacity planning and telehealth workflows helped us scale without burning out clinicians.
They gave us a clear go-to-market framework and rolled up their sleeves to help implement it. Our pipeline and win rates both improved significantly.
Standardizing our delivery model has made onboarding new consultants much smoother and improved our margins.
They helped us connect the dots between e-commerce, stores, and fulfillment. The omnichannel experience is noticeably better for our customers.
Our permitting process is finally predictable and transparent. Residents are noticing the difference.
They adapted corporate best practices to our nonprofit context without overcomplicating things.

consulting_packages.name: Operations Starter Package
consulting_packages.description: A focused engagement to diagnose key operational bottlenecks and define quick wins.

consulting_packages.name: Operations Efficiency Package
consulting_packages.description: Targeted process improvements and playbooks for one core function (e.g., order-to-cash).

consulting_packages.name: Operations Growth Package
consulting_packages.description: End-to-end review and redesign of two to three critical processes with implementation support.

consulting_packages.name: Operations Scaling Program
consulting_packages.description: A comprehensive scaling program spanning multiple teams, including change management and coaching.

consulting_packages.name: Strategy Launch Package
consulting_packages.description: Support for clarifying strategic priorities and launching a 12–18 month roadmap.

consulting_packages.name: Digital Transformation Sprint
consulting_packages.description: A three-month sprint to define the digital vision, roadmap, and initial use cases.

consulting_packages.name: Sales Enablement Essentials
consulting_packages.description: Core playbooks, messaging, and basic enablement assets for growing sales teams.
